Document:
# Player Spawn & Loading
This page describes how players join the game and how their characters are initialized.
## Spawn Flow
Player connects | Character selection screen (lobby) | Player selects species and spends creation points | Round starts (or player joins mid-round) | SpawnSystem creates entity at spawn point | Species components added (racial stats, skills) | Character stats applied (base stats + racial modifiers) | Player gains control of entity
## Character Creation Points
During character creation, players receive points to spend on stats. The number of points is configured in the server settings.
After spending, racial modifiers are applied on top of the base stats. This can cause overflow if racial bonuses push a stat past the cap.
## Known Issue
Players may spawn as a random character instead of their saved profile when using the dev map. This is a known bug related to how the dev map handles character loading. See the Known Issues section in project memory.
## Content Under Construction
Full spawn documentation coming soon. Key files: [mono]Content.Server/GameTicking/GameTicker.Spawning.cs[/mono]
